about.heading: System design. Turning vision into solutions. Delivering value.
about.pitch: Building systems has always been more than technology alone. What matters most is the product, its business value, and solutions that address real user needs. In the age of AI, this approach matters even more. See how I can help you achieve your goals.

services.title: How I Can Help
services.description: In the age of AI, technology alone is not enough. The greatest value comes from combining technical experience, business understanding, and the ability to work with people.

items.title: From Vision to Solution
items.description: I help translate business goals into concrete technology solutions.

items.title: Systems Built for Challenges
items.description: I design systems that must run reliably under load and grow with the business.

items.title: Technology and People
items.description: I help teams collaborate more effectively, make better decisions, and deliver ambitious technology goals.

items.title: AI as a Growth Tool
items.description: I help find places where AI can genuinely increase product value and organizational efficiency.
features: AI integration with products and systems

products.title: Products
products.description: My projects and products that I create additionally in my free time.
products.nextinlane_description: System for planning renovations, which organizes decisions, costs and dependencies between project elements.
products.flex_top_bar_description: WordPress plugin — announcement bar: countdown, timezone-aware scheduling, and more. Promotional campaigns and dynamic messaging have never been this easy.
products.sqlstream_description: Go library for processing SQL query results as a data stream. Process large datasets efficiently without loading everything into memory or using reflection.
